title: Codex CLI SpawnAdapter implementation + integration proof
description: Implement CodexCLISpawnAdapter, test personality compiler for Codex, write proof script, document capability gaps.

scope.in: CodexCLISpawnAdapter, personality compiler Codex output, proof script, capability gap documentation

dod.criterion: CodexCLISpawnAdapter implements SpawnAdapter and maps to codex -q spawn
Personality compiler Codex output tested — writes correct codex.md content
Proof script runs successfully without Codex installed and outputs valid JSON report
docs/codex-cli-gaps.md documents feature gaps with impact assessment

tasks.title: Implement CodexCLISpawnAdapter
tasks.scope: Create server/platform/codex-cli-spawn.ts implementing SpawnAdapter for Codex CLI.

dod.criterion: server/platform/codex-cli-spawn.ts exports CodexCLISpawnAdapter implementing SpawnAdapter interface
spawnAgent writes a codex.md file to opts.cwd before spawning the codex process
spawnAgent maps SpawnConfig to spawn('codex', ['-q', prompt]) — detached unrefs child, tracked returns promise
npm run type-check passes with no new errors

tasks.title: Test personality compiler Codex output path
tasks.scope: Test coverage for personality compiler Codex output and CodexCLISpawnAdapter integration.

dod.criterion: Test verifies compilePersonality(agentId, 'codex') returns string containing agent personality prose
Test verifies CodexCLISpawnAdapter writes codex.md to configured cwd before spawn attempt
Test verifies ENOENT error (codex not installed) is caught gracefully
All tests pass without Codex CLI installed

tasks.title: Write proof script and capability gap documentation

dod.criterion: scripts/codex-proof.ts runs via tsx without error whether or not Codex CLI is installed
Proof script outputs valid JSON with fields: platform, agentId, personalityCompiled, spawnAttempted, spawnSucceeded, error?, capabilities, timestamp
When Codex not installed, spawnSucceeded is false and error contains ENOENT — script exits 0
docs/codex-cli-gaps.md contains table with Feature | Claude Code | Codex CLI | Gap Impact covering at minimum 6 features
Gap doc notes codex.md collision risk for parallel spawns and worktree isolation mitigation
